title: Junior Revenue Manager at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions!
